message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Tennis Court Booking System

actor "users" as User
rectangle "SystemAdministrator" as Admin
actor "siteManager" as SiteManager

User -> Admin: 1 bookSite()
activate Admin
Admin -> SiteManager: 2 deliverUserRequirements()
activate SiteManager
autonumber on 3
SiteManager -> SiteManager: queryUnoccupiedSite()
SiteManager -> Admin: returnUnoccupiedSiteInfo()
deactivate SiteManager
Admin -> Admin: decidedSite()
Admin -> User: noticeSiteInfo()
deactivate Admin
autonumber off

@enduml
```
